title: Java Polymorphism Explained with Examples | Method Overloading & Overriding 🚀
description:
Java Polymorphism Explained with Examples! 🔥

In this video, we dive deep into Polymorphism in Java, covering both Method Overloading and Method Overriding with real-world examples. Polymorphism is a fundamental concept in Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) that allows methods and objects to take multiple forms, making your code more flexible and reusable.

📌 Topics Covered:
✅ What is Polymorphism?
✅ Method Overloading (Compile-time Polymorphism)
✅ Method Overriding (Runtime Polymorphism)

🔔 Don't forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more Java tutorials!
